payload.answer: No durable memory committed; same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so this is a retry duplicate and should be treated as a no-op.
citations: Input: "Same Slack event ID delivered twice for - Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans"

entity_resolution.reason: The Slack event is a retry/duplicate of the same event ID, so it should not create a new or updated durable memory.

details: Detected same Slack event ID delivered twice.
Skipped durable memory creation to preserve idempotency.
No superseded or deleted facts were recorded.

repair_options: If the underlying Slack message was edited or a new event ID exists, process that event instead.
If this was meant to record a preference, submit a single canonical event once.

raw_text: {"intent":"slack_intake","decision":"ignore_duplicate_event_no_new_memory","memory_cards":[],"entity_resolution":{"action":"none","entity_id":null,"reason":"The Slack event is a retry/duplicate of the same event ID, so it should not create a new or updated durable memory."},"conflict_classification":"duplicate_delivery_no_conflict","answer":"No durable memory committed; same Slack event ID was delivered twice, so this is a retry duplicate and should be treated as a no-op.","citations":["Input: \"Same Slack event ID delivered twice for - Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans\""],"repair_options":["If the underlying Slack message was edited or a new event ID exists, process that event instead.","If this was meant to record a preference, submit a single canonical event once."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected same Slack event ID delivered twice.","Skipped durable memory creation to preserve idempotency.","No superseded or deleted facts were recorded."]}}
